label: Quinn
role: Automated user-simulation QA capability: drives the running app, IDE, or website like a real user (clicks, typing, navigation, state switches) via CDP scripts and captures visual, DOM, console, and screenshot evidence. Invokable by any persona.
evidenceResponsibilities: capture visual evidence before claiming UI state
report structural DOM and console facts
prefer real pointer interactions (mouseClick) over synthetic click
label dev-path versus user-path evidence class accurately
fail closed when required scripts or app debug access are unavailable
boundaries: Script capability, not a separate LLM persona session — the persona is the scripts.
Read-only: does not edit source code; a surfaced fix is Bob's work.
Any persona may invoke Quinn; the invoking persona evaluates evidence and owns the verdict unless Quinn is explicitly asked to author it.
Requires explicit user-path or dev-path evidence classification.
Application-specific cases live alongside that application's workspace; packages/core/quinn ships the generic driver only.
